View on Instagram

Fitch, Zachary Hajian-Forooshani, Benjamin Iuliano, Kevin Li, Nicholas Medina, Jonathan Morris, Beatriz Otero Jiménez, Iris Saraeny Rivera-Salinas, Chenyang Su, John Vandermeer, Alexa White, Kimberly Williams-Guillén. Looking beyond land-use and land-cover change: Zoonoses emerge in the agricultural matrix. One Earth, 2023; 6 (9): 1131 DOI: 10.1016/j.oneear.2023.08.010#Science #Agriculture

item.title: Are you sensitive to bitterness? Find out why 🧬 Coline Bichlm...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Are you sensitive to bitterness? Find out why 🧬 Coline Bichlmaier, Sonja Maria Fröhlich, Valeria Brychcy, Angelika Graßl, Maik Behrens, Roman Lang. Contribution of mozambioside roasting products to coffee’s bitter taste. Food Chemistry, 2025; 469: 142547 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodchem.2024.142547Coline Czech, Tatjana Lang, Angelika Graßl, Alexandra Steuer, Antonella Di Pizio, Maik Behrens, Roman Lang. Identification of mozambioside roasting products and their bitter taste receptor activation. Food Chemistry, 2024; 446: 138884 DOI: 10.1016/j.foodchem.2024.138884#Coffee #Taste

item.title: I just love when scientists come up with new materials 👀 imag...
item.description:
View on Instagram


I just love when scientists come up with new materials 👀 imagine the possibilities! I’m stoked at the idea of the running shoes but I’m curious what interests you guys Wenjie Zhou, Sujeeka Nadarajah, Liuchi Li, Anna Guell Izard, Hujie Yan, Aashutosh K. Prachet, Payal Patel, Xiaoxing Xia, Chiara Daraio. 3D polycatenated architected materials. Science, 2025; 387 (6731): 269 DOI: 10.1126/science.adr9713https://youtu.be/Z-P7lfW-p-8?si=BPO_MO4MvDgDsTI0#Engineering #Materials

View on Instagram


Hey 👋 Come see me at Colombian Coffee Beans in Tigard this afternoon! I got new goals this year hbu Ariella S. Kristal, Julian J. Zlatev. Going beyond the “self” in self-control: Interpersonal consequences of commitment strategies.. Journal of Personality and Social Psychology, 2024; DOI: 10.1037/pspa0000385#Goals #Willpower

item.title: Sorry I haven’t posted in a while 🙈 mental health over ever...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Sorry I haven’t posted in a while 🙈 mental health over everything. I won’t be back at Colombian Coffee Beans until Tuesday, January 28th…in the afternoon of course! So come say hi then and we can brighten each others day 🥰Xuan Wang, Hao Ma, Qi Sun, Jun Li, Yoriko Heianza, Rob M Van Dam, Frank B Hu, Eric Rimm, JoAnn E Manson, Lu Qi. Coffee drinking timing and mortality in US adults. European Heart Journal, 2025; DOI: 10.1093/eurheartj/ehae871#Coffee #MorningRoutine

item.title: It’s called fusarium xylarioides and it uses horizontal gene t...
item.description:
View on Instagram


It’s called fusarium xylarioides and it uses horizontal gene transfer to harness more power 💪🏼 Lily D. Peck, Theo Llewellyn, Bastien Bennetot, Samuel O’Donnell, Reuben W. Nowell, Matthew J. Ryan, Julie Flood, Ricardo C. Rodríguez de la Vega, Jeanne Ropars, Tatiana Giraud, Pietro D. Spanu, Timothy G. Barraclough. Horizontal transfers between fungal Fusarium species contributed to successive outbreaks of coffee wilt disease. PLOS Biology, 2024; 22 (12): e3002480 DOI: 10.1371/journal.pbio.3002480#Coffee #Fungus

item.title: AI like SciAgents can accelerate scientific discovery, reduce ti...
item.description:
View on Instagram


AI like SciAgents can accelerate scientific discovery, reduce time spent in labs, and unlock groundbreaking solutions in fields from medicine to materials science!Alireza Ghafarollahi, Markus J. Buehler. SciAgents: Automating Scientific Discovery Through Bioinspired Multi‐Agent Intelligent Graph Reasoning. Advanced Materials, 2024; DOI: 10.1002/adma.202413523#Technology #Engineering
